extraction.one_line_summary: CORT Magnus won from breakaway sprint at Megève altiport after climate protest pause, POGAČAR retained yellow by 11 seconds over KÄMNA despite losing teammate BENNETT to COVID.
tactical_patterns: UAE lost Bennett to COVID pre-stage, exposing Pogačar's vulnerability in team depth before critical alpine stages ahead.
Breakaway required 60+ kilometers to establish with lightning-fast opening, suggesting GC teams allowed release only after attrition testing.
BETTIOL attacked with 43km remaining and 7-minute gap, revealing breakaway riders willing to preempt finale on rolling terrain.
WRIGHT bridged solo in final 30km during uphill section, demonstrating bahrain's aggressive tactics beyond dedicated sprint stages.

rider_signals.BENNETT George: negative: COVID withdrawal removes key domestique from UAE before stage 11-12 alpine stages, significant tactical loss.
rider_signals.KÄMNA Leonard: positive: Breakaway ride moved him to 3rd GC within 11 seconds of yellow, showing time-trialing strength on rolling terrain.
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: Dropped to 4th GC, losing podium position by exactly 11 seconds to Kämna, signaling vulnerability.
rider_signals.BETTIOL Alberto: neutral: Solo attack with 7-minute gap at 43km showed ambition but couldn't sustain through 20km uphill finish.
rider_signals.WRIGHT Fred: positive: Second aggressive stage performance post-rest day, bridging to breakaway in final 30km uphill section.
rider_signals.CORT Magnus: positive: Timed uphill sprint finish perfectly, using Schultz's slipstream to win by quarter-wheel from reduced group.
